title: Orbital's Radish Mod
description: A basic food mod that adds radishes, radish blocks, a radish weapon, and more!
body:
Adds a fully-featured radish crop and item set to Minecraft (Forge 1.20.x). Designed to behave like vanilla potatoes/carrots villagers can harvest, replant, and trade; zombies can drop radishes, pigs can be tempted and bred with radishes, stonecutter and smelting recipes, and radish block building variants (stairs/slabs/walls).

![Orbital radish mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46aff2651dd3136e83d7fbaa1a285bc768335994_0.webp)



# Features
- Radish crop block (8 growth stages) and radish item (raw & cooked).
- Villager integration: farmers harvest and replant radishes; radishes usable in trades.
- Pig integration: pigs are tempted by radishes, can be fed to grow or breed.
- Zombie loot: zombies can drop radishes; drops are cooked if zombie is on fire.
- Recipes: stonecutter, smelting, smoking and campfire cooking; shapeless radish stew recipe.
- Building blocks: radish block, stairs, slabs, walls, and radish bricks.
- Vanilla-friendly networking — fixes client/server ghosting for villager pickups.

# Installation
1. Install Minecraft and forge for the mod version you want to use.
2. Drop the mod .JAR into `mods/`.
3. Start Minecraft (best on a fresh testing world).

# Supported versions
- Minecraft: **1.20-1.21.1**
- Loader: **Forge**
